positive: A stylized, symmetrical minimalist emblem featuring a majestic silhouette of a howling wolf head surrounded by delicate, swirling botanical elements and celestial crescent moons. The design must utilize negative space effectively, achieving a high-contrast, single-color ink look (black on white). Style: Clean linework illustration, engraved etching aesthetic, geometric abstraction, tribal knotwork influence. Composition: Centered, vertically balanced, suitable for a chest graphic print. Lighting: Studio flash, flat, even lighting to emphasize lines and silhouettes. Color direction: Monochromatic black and deep charcoal grey accents only. Compositional details: Crisp lines, strong clean edges, scalable and easily recognizable as a standalone print graphic.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, gradient, blur, text, writing, logo, watermark, signature, noise, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, abstract colors, messy, messy lines, grainy, smudge
